title: Solana GoldRush Quickstart
description: Scaffold a production-ready Solana wallet dashboard in one command using the GoldRush Next.js starter for Solana — pre-wired with `@covalenthq/client-sdk`, Solana wallet adapter (Phantom/Backpack/Solflare), and four ready-to-run components: SPL token balances table with USD values, decoded transaction history feed with program labels, Metaplex NFT gallery, and a wallet age summary card. Clone, add `GOLDRUSH_API_KEY=your_key` to `.env.local`, run `npm dev`, and ship. No blockchain parsing required.
useCase: Scaffold a production-ready Solana wallet dashboard with token balances, transaction history, NFT gallery, and wallet age summary all pre-wired and ready to ship in minutes.

keyParams.address: Connected Solana wallet address from the wallet adapter
keyParams.nft: Set to false in balance call to separate NFT and token queries
keyParams.no_spam: Set to true to filter spam tokens and NFTs
keyParams.page_size: Number of transactions to display in the activity feed
